summary: The user sought skincare product recommendations for dry skin, expressing satisfaction with Glow Theory's facial moisturizer and mentioning their success in earning over 500 points in the Target rewards program. They also discussed their interest in sustainable shopping at a local boutique called "The Hive" and inquired about canceling their Box of Style subscription while seeking skincare recommendations from them.
facts: The user has been enjoying the facial moisturizer from Glow Theory.
The user has earned over 500 points in the Target rewards program in the past month by stocking up on household essentials.
The user discovered a thrift store called "The Vintage Spot" and is interested in exploring more thrift stores in their area.
The user is planning a trip to a local boutique called "The Hive" this weekend to shop for sustainable clothing brands.
The user is considering canceling their subscription to Box of Style, a monthly subscription service for beauty and lifestyle products.
The user has had bad reactions to skincare products in the past and emphasizes the importance of research and patch tests.
The user is interested in asking Box of Style for skincare product recommendations similar to Glow Theory's facial moisturizer.
